settings.heading: Compounded, never copied
settings.body: Every formula begins on a pharmacist's bench — not in a marketing room. Active concentrations are calibrated to skin physiology, then double-checked in lab.

settings.heading: Heirloom luxury
settings.body: Heavy glass. Hand-poured. Numbered batches. Objects you keep on the counter, not under the sink. The kind of bottle a daughter inherits.

settings.heading: For the women we love
settings.body: Made first for wives, mothers, daughters and best friends — then offered to you. The standard never wavered because the audience never did.

settings.title: Trust.
settings.lede: Pharmacist credibility that feels warm, not clinical.
settings.item1: — Credentials are the proof. Love is the reason.
settings.item2: — Every active ingredient cleared by a licensed pharmacist.
settings.item3: — Transparency on dose, on source, on shelf-life.

settings.title: Luxury.
settings.lede: Aspirational, never arrogant. Every touchpoint signals prestige.
settings.item3: — A box you keep, not unbox.

settings.title: Warmth.
settings.lede: Luxury with a heartbeat. The founder story makes Chemistrie unlike anything in the category.
settings.item1: — Two pharmacists. Husbands and fathers first.
settings.item2: — Formulas tested on the women they love.
settings.crest_sub: written by hand · in every box

settings.name: Retinaldehyde
settings.description: Eleven times faster than retinol. Half the irritation. The dose only a pharmacist would risk.

settings.name: L-Ascorbic Acid
settings.description: Stabilised with ferulic and tocopherol. The pharmacist's gold standard for brightening.

settings.name: Niacinamide
settings.description: Refines pore visibility, reinforces barrier. Universally well-tolerated.

settings.name: Bakuchiol
settings.description: Botanical retinol-alternative for pregnancy and the most sensitive nights.

settings.name: Mandelic Acid
settings.description: The kindest AHA. Large molecule, slow penetration, dignified results.

settings.name: Peptide-5
settings.description: Signals collagen synthesis. Daily, undramatic improvement.

settings.name: Ceramide Complex
settings.description: Three ceramides mirroring the lipid ratio of healthy young skin.

settings.name: Squalane
settings.description: Plant-derived. Pharmaceutical-grade. Closes the ritual, never clogs.

settings.name: Calendula
settings.description: Anti-inflammatory infusion. The reason redness softens, not just hides.

settings.name: Hyaluronic, 3-MW
settings.description: Low, mid and high molecular weights — together. Hydration at every layer.

settings.name: Allantoin
settings.description: Soothes, smooths, accelerates barrier repair after every active.

settings.name: Centella Asiatica
settings.description: Madecassoside-rich. The bench's favourite calming active.

settings.name: Cleanse
settings.description: A milk that lifts without stripping. Worked into dry skin with both hands, eyes closed, breath slow.

settings.name: Tone
settings.description: Mandelic acid at 8%, low and weekly. Sweep across the T-zone with a cotton round. Then wait, dignified, for sixty seconds.

settings.name: Treat
settings.description: Retinaldehyde at night. L-Ascorbic in morning. Press, do not rub. The face is not a counter to be wiped down.

settings.name: Seal
settings.description: The Velvet Cream, warmed between the palms. Pressed upward along the jaw, the cheekbones, the brow. A small ceremony, every night.

settings.quote: I have been a dermatology nurse for nineteen years. This is the first brand I trust on my own daughter's face.
settings.attribution: — Marisol R., Houston, TX · Verified Buyer

settings.quote: The pharmacist wrote me back personally about my redness. I bought three more bottles that afternoon.
settings.attribution: — Priya S., Austin, TX · Verified Buyer

settings.quote: Heavy glass. Numbered batch. A handwritten card. I keep the box on my dresser.
settings.attribution: — Linnea H., Dallas, TX · Verified Buyer

settings.quote: Made by pharmacists, made for the women they love — finally a tagline that delivers on the bottle, too.
settings.attribution: — Camille D., New Orleans, LA · Verified Buyer
